subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सी पहाड़ी क्षेत्रों में लगी है।
explanation_en:
Jaswant Thada is a famous monument located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. It was built in memory of Maharaja Jaswant Singh II and is a popular tourist attraction.

Jaisamand Fort is a historical fort located in Rajasthan and was built during the 15th century. It is known for its unique architecture and strategic location.
